titleStmt.title: SII 28.76: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 76. (A.R. No. 74 of 1913.) TIRUCHCHEṄGĀṬṬĀṄGUḌI, NANNILAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Uttarāpatīśvara temple, second gōpuram right of entrance (west wall).

The chief is entitled, as available in the extent portion, as srīman-[mahāma]ṇḍalēśvara, paṭṭu-kaṭṭāri, rāya-vaśaṅkara, and matiyāda-ma[nnarmaṇavāla]. He is the same as the one who figures in a Kumbakōṇam record (259/1912), where he further claimed to be Kāñchīpura-varādhīśvara (See A.R, Ep. 1913 Part II, para 72; also ibid., 1912 Part II, para 53).

It records a niṉṟayam (nirṇṇaya) made by Māḷuva-chchakkiṟavartti, as conveyed to the accountant (kaṇakkuppiḷḷai) of the temple at Tiruchcheṅgāṭṭaṅguḍi, granting the several levies (leviable on the lands belonging to the temple-kōyil-chīrmai ?) excluding veṭṭi-vari, as sarvamānyam, for conducting the services, daily and on special festival days like the one in the months of Chittirai and the car-festival, of Nāyiṉār Uttarāpatināyakar. The list of the levies given in this record is in many respects similar to those found in different regions belonging to about the same period (See A.R. 1913, Part II, para 54, 56).

A somewhat unique feature of the grant is that the grantee (the authorities in charge of the temple) was exhorted to enjoy what had been granted without fear (añchāmal) and at ease (śukham-āga), indicating that the grant made might not be interfered with.
It may also be noted that sarva-mānya in this record appears to have indicated something (here, the grant), which was to be duly recognised and honoured by all.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . Āṉanta varuṣam mācimātam 10 5 nāḷ śrīmanmakāmaṇṭaleśvaraṉ paṭṭukaṭṭārirāyava caṅkaraṉ matiyātama[ṉṉar maṇavāḷa]ṉkā
koṉeri teva makāirācāviṉ kāriyattukku kaṭavār tirucceṅkāṭṭaṅkuṭi koyil koyil kaṇakkuppiḷḷaikku Aṟiya varakkāṭṭiṉa kāriyam taṅkaḷ koyil cirmaikku vācalilp
ṭuk kāṇikkai kaṟppūra kāṇikkai Atikāri coṭi cūlavari rekai koṟṟu Ilakkai Aracupeṟu Irāyatavaṟttaṉai putuvari Irāyatavaṟttaṉai Avakā ttaṉai
ṇikkai tiṉacari kāṇikkai pattukku Iraṇṭu kāṇikkai kallaṇai Āḷ tuṭṭi Eruttu Aḷavu Eruttuppaṭi nallerutu naṟppacu koṇikai virimuṭṭu A ṉai nilai Āḷtā
yam Iṭaittuṟai kucattuṟai kācupāṭu neṟttaṭṭāyam makamai vaḻiccāri cekkāyam tirikai Āyam kallāyam karuvippaṇam maṟṟum Ācu potumakkaḷu
m Āṟu veṭṭuk kuḷaveṭṭuk koṭṭai Āḷ teṉṉalai Ūḻiyam cā kavari tuṇṭavari camaiyappaṭi Iṭaṅkaivari valaṅkaivari ko maṇaivari muka ttavaṉ paḷḷar
Ūḻiyam Okaṉavaṟttaṉai calattaram calattarakāttikai kāṇikkai potārikkam Iṉaveḷḷāḻavari Āka Iṉta varikaḷ Uḷḷatu veṭṭivari niṅkalāka[ vum]
paḻavari putuvari Uṇṭāṉatu kaḻittu sarvvamānnyam Āka nāḷatu mutalukku naṭakkumpaṭi kaṟpittu Olai Eḻutikkuṭuppatu Eṉṟu māḷuvac cakkiṟavaṟttikaḷ
tiruvuḷḷam paṟṟi Aruḷiṉapaṭiyāle muṉvakaiyil Eḻutiṉavāṟe Uḷḷatu kaḻittu sarvvamānnyamāka naṭakkumpaṭiyum kaṟppittapaṭiyāle Inta varikaḷ
koṇṭu nayiṉār Uttarāpati nāyakaṟkku tiṅkaḷ tivatam tirunāḷ Ūḻiyam cittirait tirunāḷ tirutter tirunāḷ Iṉṉatu Eṉṉāmala ṉa l ṉa ṟuta
viṉ Upaiyam Āka naṭatti Oṉṟukkum Añcāmal cukattile Irukkavum Iṉta niṉṟayappaṭiyile nāḷatu mutalukku sarvva mānnyam
kaṟpittapaṭiyāle muṉ Eḻutiṉa vakaippaṭi varikaḷ Uḷḷatu sarvvamānnyamāka Aṉupavittukkoṇṭu Oṉṟukkum Añcāmal cukattile Iru
kkavum Inta ṉinṟayapaṭiyile sarvvamānnyamāka Aṉupavittuk koḷvatu Iṉta niṉṟayappaṭiyile caṟuvamāṉṉiyamāka Aṉupavittu
kkoḷḷavum tiṉacari pativu Iṉta niṉṟayappaṭiyile caṟuva māṉṉiyamāka Aṉupavittukkoḷvatu
Inta taṉmattukku Iyātoruttar Akitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaik karaiyil kārām pacuvaik koṉṟa
doṣattile poka kaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum § sudattātya dviguṇam puṇyam parada
ttānupālanam paradattāpahāreṇa sudattam nniṣphalam bhavetya §
Digital edition of SII 28.76 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
